nearest_nuclear_power_plant.name: Nogent Nuclear Power Plant
nearest_nuclear_power_plant.note: Located in Nogent-sur-Seine, this plant houses two reactors with a combined capacity of around 2,620 MW

nearest_nuclear_power_plant.name: Tricastin Nuclear Power Plant
nearest_nuclear_power_plant.note: Situated near the Rhône River, Tricastin comprises four reactors with a total capacity of about 3,660 MW

nearest_nuclear_power_plant.name: Bugey Nuclear Power Plant
nearest_nuclear_power_plant.note: Located in Saint-Vulbas, Bugey has four operational reactors with a combined capacity of around 3,580 MW

nearest_nuclear_power_plant.name: Golfech Nuclear Power Plant
nearest_nuclear_power_plant.note: This facility consists of two reactors with a total capacity of about 2,620 MW.

nearest_nuclear_power_plant.name: Gravelines Nuclear Power Plant
nearest_nuclear_power_plant.note: Gravelines is one of France's largest nuclear facilities, housing six reactors with a combined capacity of around 5,460 MW.
